arguments: task objective, target paths, and required evidence
body: Produce a decision-complete plan after inspecting repo evidence, current roadmap, provider docs in source, and package boundaries. Include implementation sequence, acceptance proof, and explicit assumptions. Avoid architecture theater: every package split, abstraction, schema, hook, and validation gate must be requested or source-required. The route must declare owner, permissions, allowed tools, validation expectations, output contract, hook expectations, and provider-specific differences.
